headline: Semis Take The Tape
subhead: S&P +0.79% to record 7,164. Nasdaq +1.63% all-time high. Intel halo lifts AMD +13.91%, QCOM +11.12%. Iran talks resume in Islamabad.

headline: Software Cracks
subhead: S&P −0.42% off intraday record. SaaS rout led by IBM and ServiceNow. Texas Instruments lifts analog. NEE blows out, LMT misses.

headline: Risk Returns
subhead: S&P +1.05% to record 7,137. Nasdaq +1.64% to all-time high. Semis surge on AI capex confirmation. TEL beats and raises but falls 9.10%.

headline: Both Sleeves Beat
subhead: S&P -0.66% to 7,063 on Iran stall, Warsh hawkish tilt, and Apple CEO transition. Dividend +0.03% beats DVY and SPY. Growth Portfolio -0.08% beats IUSG. STLD +5.19% on record steel shipments.

headline: The Test Holds
subhead: S&P -0.22% to 7,109 absorbing weekend escalation. Both IOWN sleeves positive, beating every benchmark. Bitcoin +3.33% to $76,281. STLD +4.51% into post-close print.

headline: The Strait, Open
subhead: S&P +1.19% to a fresh all-time high. Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz. WTI down roughly 11%. Third consecutive up week.

headline: Quiet New Highs
subhead: S&P +0.23% to 7,039, another record close. Nasdaq gains 12th straight day, longest streak since 2009. AMD +7.80%.

headline: Seven Thousand
subhead: S&P 500 +0.79% to 7,022 — first record close since January 28. Nasdaq +1.59%, 11th straight gain. Morgan Stanley posts record quarter.

headline: Seven Thousand in Sight
subhead: S&P +1.17% to 6,967. Nasdaq rises a tenth straight day. Core PPI cools to +0.1%. IMF cuts 2026 global growth to 3.1%.

headline: Iran Calls. Market Answers.
subhead: S&P +1.01% to 6,885. Trump says Iran wants a deal — blockade begins, market shrugs the open and closes near highs. Software led; FAST fell on in-line earnings.

headline: Ceasefire Holds
subhead: S&P 500 -0.10% to 6,818. CPI surges to 3.3% on war-driven energy shock. Core holds at 2.6%. Islamabad talks begin Saturday.

headline: Seven Straight
subhead: S&P +0.61% to 6,824. Seventh consecutive gain. Ceasefire fraying but holding. Oil back above $100. Core PCE at 3.0%.

headline: Ceasefire Rally
subhead: S&P +2.52% to 6,783. Two-week US-Iran ceasefire reopens Hormuz. WTI plunges 17%. Semis and industrials lead.

headline: Deadline Drift
subhead: S&P +0.08% as Pakistan extension request trims 1.2% intraday loss. Trump’s 8 PM Iran deadline dominates. WTI near $113. Gold +1.0% to $4,732.

headline: Deadline Eve
subhead: S&P +0.43% as ceasefire hopes offset Tuesday strike threat. ISM Services cools to 54, prices surge to 70.7. Digital assets lead; IBIT +4.08%.

headline: The Claw Back
subhead: S&P erased a 1.5% gap-down to close +0.09%. WTI surged past $110. Iran–Oman Hormuz protocol lifted equities off lows. 100% pharma tariffs announced at the bell.

headline: Hormuz Hope
subhead: S&P +0.71% for second straight gain. Brent briefly below $100. ISM Manufacturing 52.7. Trump says Iran asked for ceasefire — Iran denies it.

headline: Hope Trade Holds
subhead: S&P +2.92% as Trump signals willingness to end Iran war. Nasdaq +3.83%. Tech leads broad rally. WTI pulls back to $101. Q1 closes down ~7%.

headline: Hope Fades
subhead: S&P -0.39% as diplomatic rally dissolves. WTI settles above $100 for the first time since 2022. Powell says rates in a good place.

headline: Correction Confirmed
subhead: S&P −1.57% to seven-month low. Fifth straight weekly decline. Dow and Nasdaq 100 enter correction. Brent settles at $112.57.

headline: No Deal
subhead: S&P −1.76% to lowest since September. Brent $108. Nasdaq enters correction. Trump walks back ceasefire signal.

headline: Relief Held
subhead: S&P +0.54% to 6,592. Oil fell 4% on 15-point peace plan. AMD +7.26% on CPU pricing power. Gold $4,502.

headline: Show Me the Deal
subhead: S&P 500 -0.36% as Monday rally fades. Brent climbs back above $104. Iran denies talks. COIN -10% on stablecoin legislation.

headline: Force Majeure
subhead: S&P -1.51% to 6,507 as Iraq halts oil exports. Brent tops $112. Russell enters correction. Fourth straight losing week.

headline: Dip Bought
subhead: S&P 500 -0.28% after erasing a 1% drop. Brent spiked to $119, reversed to $108 on Hormuz reopening. Fed holds, signals one cut. Gold -4.9%.

headline: Powell Puts Cuts on Ice
subhead: S&P 500 -1.37% as Fed holds, flags inflation risk from Iran war. PPI surges 0.7%. Brent tops $104. Gold -3.6%.

headline: Hormuz Hopes
subhead: S&P +1.02% to 6,700. Tanker crossings ease oil fears. Nvidia GTC lifts semis. VIX drops 13.5%. Bitcoin tops $74K.

headline: Markets at War
subhead: Day 4 of US-Israel-Iran conflict. S&P whipsaws. Oil surges. VIX spikes.

headline: The Market Exhaled
subhead: S&P +0.77%. Crypto rallies. ISM services surge. Oil flattens. VIX falls 10%.

headline: War Premium Returns
subhead: S&P −0.58%. Dow plunges 1.6%. Oil surges on tanker strike. Broadcom beats big after the bell.

headline: Payrolls Collapse
subhead: NFP −92,000. Oil breaks $90. VIX +25% to 29.66. S&P −1.36% for its worst week since October.

headline: Reversal of Fortune
subhead: Oil touches $119 overnight, then retreats. Trump signals war nearing completion. S&P erases 1.5% loss to close +0.81%.

headline: Holding Pattern
subhead: S&P −0.22%. Markets tread water ahead of CPI. Gold tops $5,200. Oil continues retreat from $119 peak.

headline: Calm Before the Storm
subhead: CPI in line at 2.4% — but pre-war data. Market fades as traders price the oil shock ahead. VLO +5.7%. SYK −3.0%.

headline: Credit Cracks Widen
subhead: Private credit stress spreads. Oil resumes climb. S&P −1.53%. Morgan Stanley caps withdrawals. FOMC next Wednesday.

headline: Three Weeks Red
subhead: S&P −0.61% to new 2026 low. Third straight losing week. Brent above $103. Q4 GDP revised down. GTC Monday. FOMC Wednesday.

headline: Quiet Bounce
subhead: S&P +0.27% as equities stabilize. Oil disruptions persist—Brent above $100, diesel crosses $5. VIX eases to 22.38.

headline: The Reversal
subhead: S&P +1.16% as Trump suspends Iran strikes for five days. Brent whipsaws from $114 to $100. Gold −3.7% in worst week since 1983.
